failure_modes.text: Awareness of the bias blind spot can become performative self-knowledge that sounds humble without changing how evidence is weighed.
failure_modes.source_quote: Danger when awareness of the bias blind spot becomes performative self-knowledge that sounds humble without changing how evidence is weighed.
failure_modes.mitigation: Run a pre-mortem: imagine the project failed and ask what went wrong, forcing the team to surface the biases that performative awareness would have missed.

failure_modes.text: The model can be used mainly to diagnose other people's distortions, recreating the same blind spot at a higher level.
failure_modes.source_quote: Danger when the model is used mainly to diagnose other people's distortions, which recreates the same blind spot at a higher level.
failure_modes.mitigation: Use triangulation and peer review: introduce diversity of thinking through mock trials or red-team exercises that turn the diagnosis inward.

failure_modes.text: Intelligence can enlarge the blind spot by improving the quality of rationalizations that defend a preferred story.
failure_modes.source_quote: being smart can actually make bias worse
failure_modes.mitigation: Use structured reflection: look at patterns of your past mistakes and ask whether you would make the same decision with more time, more data, or different incentives.

premortem_questions.text: What if our awareness of this bias changes nothing about how we are currently weighing evidence?
premortem_questions.source_quote: simply knowing about the Bias Blind Spot is often not enough

premortem_questions.text: What external check, peer challenge, or calibration tool could disconfirm the story we currently find most flattering?
Where are we assuming we are the exception instead of subjecting our own reasoning to the same test we apply to others?
premortem_questions.source_quote: the tendency to be much better at recognizing biased reasoning in others than in oneself

heuristics.text: Use the outside view and external calibration when strong self-confidence would otherwise dominate local judgment.
Flip the lens around with an academic selfie before critiquing others so the first target of scrutiny is your own story.
Force simple explanation or journaling so hidden assumptions and rationalizations have fewer places to hide.

curation_notes.summary: The source is naturally chunk-ready on self-exemption, rationalization, outside-view correction, and anti-performative humility discipline.
donor_drops: Did not preserve broad introspection rhetoric because the raw source is stronger on concrete calibration moves and peer challenge.
open_questions: The third heuristic compresses the source's journaling and simplification methods into one operational chunk so the file stays compact.

allies: The raw ally surface is strongest on feynman-technique, intellectual-humility, and multidisciplinary thinking because they expose hidden self-exemption.
antagonists: The raw antagonist pressure is strongest on confirmation-bias and rationalization because those models amplify self-protective interpretation.
structured_tensions: The source names confirmation-bias as a direct interaction, while the rest of the pressure is better preserved as allies and heuristics than as forced tension blocks.
